_comment: Versioned scoring config for the nightly aggregation. Thresholds live HERE, never as literals
in aggregate.py — the brief's first design rule. Retuning the gate is a config edit + re-run,
not a code change or a migration.
Mirrors the `scoring` block of the app config in docs/M1/02-flutter-app.md; keep the two in
step so the number the app reports against is the number the backend scores by.
calibration_version stamps every scores row, so a snapshot always says which tuning produced it.
